fullName: Government websites, official diplomatic directories, UN mission listings, DFAT Australian website
All contact info should be verified on official government websites before use - staff/offices change regularly
For direct contact with heads of government/state, use official PMO/Presidential office channels, not personal emails
Many countries do not publish direct executive contact details for security reasons - use main ministry switchboards or webforms
Add sheets for specific regions (EU Ministers, ASEAN Leaders, African Union) as needed
Update quarterly - government changes, elections, and staff reshuffles occur frequently
Handle government contact data responsibly - not all addresses/numbers are public for operational security
For most countries, foreign ministry webforms or embassy contacts in your country are preferred for official communication
2. Verify contacts on official gov websites for each country
3. Add relevant ministers (Foreign Affairs, Trade, Defense, etc.)
4. Use diplomatic protocol for initial outreach
5. Maintain a 'Last Updated' column to track data freshness
